name: Pepper Vodka Pasta Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crushed chiles and vodka in a jar.
2. Allow the mixture to set for at least one week.
3. Strain off the liquid and return it to the bottle.
4. Place the bottle in the freezer (the alcohol content prevents freezing, but the mixture will become syrup-like).
5. For cooking: Cook pasta al dente.
6. In a separate pan, melt butter, add pepper vodka, tomatoes, and cream; simmer for about five minutes.
7. Season with salt.
8. Drain the pasta and add it to the sauce.
9. Stir in grated Parmesan cheese until well combined.
10. Serve over the cooked pasta.
